title: Pravda Russkaya: Russian Truth (Law Code)
description: The oldest Russian law code, compiled under Yaroslav the Wise — establishing fines, rights, and procedures for Kievan Rus.
introduction: The oldest Russian law code, compiled under Yaroslav the Wise — establishing fines, rights, and procedures for Kievan Rus.

translation.text: If a man kills a man, the brother shall avenge the brother. If there is no avenger, the fine shall be forty grivnas. If a man strikes another with a stick, or a rod, or a fist — three grivnas.
